titleStmt.title: SII 37.403: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 403. (A.R. No. B 50 of 1941-42.) Iṭiguḷḷapāḍu, Badvel Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab lying near a ruined temple in the old village site about 1/4 km to the east of the village.
This is dated in the Śaka and cyclic year Raudri, Chaitra ba • • • ., Thursday.

Much wornout. It records the grant of the village Muḍumāla in the Sakali-bhumi to Rājaguru Śāntapūrvaśiva, the pontiff of the Abhinava Gōlakīmaṭha at Śrī Parvata by the chief for the entertainment of the Brahmaṇas and guests and for a worship in the Vidya-maṇḍapa attached to the Śivalinga-maṭha.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
lines are damaged
ścimarāya dāmō
dara sainyadiśāpaṭasthai
nibaddha śaraṇāgata
vajrapēṭi nāmādi sa
masta praśasti sahita
śrīmatu maṁḍaḷika bra
hmarākṣasa gaṁḍapeṁḍā
ramahārāja pādō
pajīvi . śrī matu
janniga dēvaṁḍu svasti
śaka varuṣaṁbulu
1182 Agunēṭi rau
dri vatsara caitra ba
guruvāramu
nāṁṭi mēṣa saṁkrāṁti
kālamuna

śrī tilaka trilakṣagrā
gōḷakī mahāmaṭha sāmrājya padavi
śrīmadrāja gurucaraṇa sarasīru
ha bhūṣita mastaka śrītripurāṁtta
ka dēvadivya śrīpādapadmārādhaku
laina śrīparvatamu [A]bhinava gōḷe
kī maṭhamu śrīmatu rājaguru
śāṁtapūrva śivadēśikulaku śivaliṁ
ga maṭha vidyāmaṁḍapa Adhyayana
śiśrūṣaka brāhmaṇa Atithi Abhyāga
ta pūjārttamugānu sakalibhūmi
lōnu sakali vīṭi paḍumaṟa mu
ḍumāla Aniyeḍi yūru pa
nnulu sahitamugānu catussī
mamu sakalāya sahitamu
Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigā dhārāpū
vakamu śēśi Iciri
svadattaṁ
Digital edition of SII 37.403 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
